use_cases: Navigating through pages of search results or filtered content listings
Browsing multi-page data tables in SaaS dashboards
Paging through product catalogs in e-commerce storefronts
Navigating article or blog post archives in media applications
Accessing paginated course content or lesson modules in educational platforms
ai_summary: A clean, minimalist pagination component from reuno-ui designed for navigating through multi-page content. Features responsive button sizing with subtle hover states and active press animations, displaying numbered page indicators with the current page highlighted in indigo. Suitable for any application requiring basic list or content pagination, with straightforward implementation that adapts seamlessly between desktop and mobile viewports.
